name: Cavatiney
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil a half bag of medium noodles.
2. Brown one pound hamburger and one pound sausage.
3. Drain the noodles.
4. In a bowl, mix the hamburger and sausage. Add one jar pizza sauce and half a jar spaghetti sauce.
5. Grease a baking dish with butter (only a thin coat).
6. Spoon in the meat mixture.
7. Top with pepperoni, mozzarella cheese, and sharp cheddar cheese.
8. Sprinkle lightly with garlic powder.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for the cheese to melt.
It tastes like a pizza lasagne. Enjoy!
